creator: hardy.schumacher@gmx.de
text:
Update for port devel/apache-ant to v1.9.3 is available. It contains several bugfixes and enhancements.
Furthermore I adopted the Makefile to new options framework (hint from portlint).

Note: This PR supersedes PR:178728 "[UPDATE] devel/apache-ant to v1.9.0".

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: n/a
